hooks.command: if printf '%s\n' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'go test|go run.*_test'; then echo '⚠️  WORKTREE SAFETY REMINDER: Tests that call removeWorktree/removeWorktreeAndBranch or scan ~/.argus/worktrees/ MUST use t.TempDir() paths — never real ~/.argus/ paths. On 2026-03-20 a test wiped 12 live worktrees by scanning the real filesystem. The runtime testGuard blocks this now, but design tests correctly.'; fi
